original: Implant thrusters fire, launching her aside!

XOs make up the cybernetically augmented core of Dhaal’s police forces, but this one takes body modification to the extreme. Decked out from head to toe in metallic mods, she is a walking tornado of destruction just waiting to descend upon you, restrain you, and punish you to the fullest extent of Dhaal’s brutal penal codes. She watches you from behind the metal of her visor with impassive determination. Her tail lashes back and forth behind, tipped with a gleaming blade.
context: <<POS:05562851>> , launching her aside!",e.long='XOs make up the cybernetically augmented core of Dhaal’s pol'

original: Ports in the XO’s chestplate flash for a split-second before erupting in a spray of sticky white fluid. The diffuse spray is unavoidable, its stickiness magnitudes higher than you had expected. The weaponized adhesive coating you has reduced your evasion!
context: <> combatOutput("Ports in the XO’s chestplate flash for a split-second before erupting in a spray of sticky white fluid. The diffuse spray is unavoidable, its stickiness magnitudes higher than you had expected. The weaponized adhesive coating you has reduced your evasion!",null,this)

original: “Corporate justice is inevitable. Flight is impossible.” The XO raises her arm, palm outstretched, and dozens of tiny micro-bots flutter into the air, levitating briefly before launching in your direction! They slap against you and dig into your equipment with tiny metal feet, chirping happily as internal trackers activate. “Yield.” You can’t escape!

original: Char-blackened plates cover most of the hazard trooper’s body, and what isn’t covered by the plates is guarded by an amber, seemingly opaque bubble helm of exotic design and manufacture. Nevertheless, you feel the masked soldier’s baleful glare lingering on your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun], like she’s already imagining the damage her rivet gun can do to your flesh, though maybe she just likes what she sees? You’ll have to be careful getting close. No zaika, no matter how hot she may be under her armor, can compare to the blazing catastrophe that is her plasma-fueled torch.

original: A fearsome titan of flesh and metal, Fabricator Marshall Rizzon Zau looms tall over the battlefield, hefting her rotary autocannon as easily as a lesser zaika might tote a broomstick. The lines of her cybernetic augments spiderweb across every inch of exposed ‘skin’ - that looks as hard as a tank’s armor plating. She smiles with all the mirth of a feral shark, her cybernetic eyes burning with determination and hate for all who would stand in the way of her aspirations. You face Dhaal’s most violent titan of industry herself. She does not seem worried.
context: <<POS:05596632>> a",e.a="",e.capitalA="",e.long='A fearsome titan of flesh and metal, Fabricator Marshall Riz'

original: Fabricator Marshal Rizzon Zau stands before you - or her body, anyway. Her mind is locked away, overridden by the inexorable pressure of an AI’s instantly reconfigurable body-jacking scripts. The giant zaika’s heavily augmented body glows faintly, her cybernetics clocked up to the absolute breaking point. Heat radiates off of her in waves as she hefts her multibarrelled autocannon vaguely in your direction, more than willing to destroy any organic life that threatens Ehura’s vision of Paragon’s future.
context: <<POS:05602074>> this.long='Fabricator Marshal Rizzon Zau stands before you - or her bod'

original: Overtaken by an untested mod, Fabricator Marshal Rizzon Zau’s body almost looks almost mutated. Her digitally controlled, cable-corded muscles bulge obscenely, radiating a heat and light from the cracks like crusted over lava. The rotary autocannon in her hands looks almost tiny by comparison - a tank barrel would be a better fit. She howls in bestial rage as she confronts you, burning herself out for one final, glorious battle.
context: <<POS:05602966>> this.long='Overtaken by an untested mod, Fabricator Marshal Rizzon Zau’'
